name: Olive Garden Tomato/Basil Crostini
recipeIngredient: Boboli bread shells or similar Italian flatbread - 2 6-inch
Roma tomatoes - 1 1/2 cups, diced (after removing seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Soak 1 clove garlic in 2 tbsp olive oil for at least 1 hour before use.
3. Line a sheet pan or cookie sheet with foil.
4. Drizzle 2 tbsp garlic-infused olive oil over the bread shells, sprinkle grated parmesan, and bake for 4 to 5 minutes until hot but not crisped or dried.
5. Cut the baked bread into wedges (6 pieces) or squares measuring 2 inches.
6. Remove from oven and transfer to a serving plate, covering generously with cold tomato/basil topping.
7. Prepare the topping by combining all ingredients thoroughly in a bowl and refrigerating for at least 2 hours before serving.
8. Just prior to serving, drain excess liquid using a colander or strainer.
Source: The Olive Garden.
